series_metadata.series_title: Children’s Trust Fund County Allocation Files
series_metadata.series_description: Biennial state plan and records relating to Children’s TrustFund allocations to counties for child abuse and neglect prevention. Includes localallocation plans, grantee applications, prevention plan (2001), plan feedback forms,annual program and fiscal reports, supplemental allocation documents, and related emailcorrespondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 4 years and 3 year in records center, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in office 4 years and 3 year in records center, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
